def: To gather or form into a globe.
Looking, or narrowly examining; prying. [Obs.] "Thoseemissitious eyes." Bp. Hall.
Of or pertaining to strychnine; produced by strychnine; as,strychnic compounds; strychnic poisoning; specifically (Chem.),
An imaginary creature, of undefined character. [Slang]
Western; occidental. [R.]Forth rush the levant and the ponent winds. Milton.
Being well folded. [Obs.] "Her well-plighted frock." Spenser.
Equally extensive; having as, consciousness and knowledge arecoextensive. Sir W. Hamilton.-- Co`ex*ten"sive*ly, adv.-- Co`ex*ten"sive*ness, n.
